description: The first maintained, agent-native CLI for Agilix Buzz — every DLAP command plus offline activity analytics, content review, and a local database no other Buzz tool has.

novel_features.name: Stale-gradebook / ungraded-backlog finder
novel_features.description: Find teachers and courses with the largest ungraded backlogs and the oldest unscored submissions, tree-wide.

novel_features.name: Teacher engagement & grading-cadence report
novel_features.description: Per-teacher last login, days since last grade, median submit-to-grade turnaround, feedback count, and active-section count — flags inactive teachers.

novel_features.name: At-risk / falling-behind student detector
novel_features.description: Ranks students by a composite risk score: idle days, low completion ratio, low submission rate, and grades below a threshold.

novel_features.name: Macro class engagement & grade distribution
novel_features.description: Per-section active-vs-idle counts, submission and completion rates, A-F grade-distribution histogram, per-item completion funnel, and mean time-on-task.

novel_features.name: Course content-structure viewer
novel_features.description: Renders a course's full item hierarchy (folders, assignments, assessments) with type, points, due dates, and resource-count rollups.

novel_features.name: Course content diff
novel_features.description: Diffs two courses' content: added/removed/changed items, points-total drift, and resource-count drift.

novel_features.name: Tree-wide role audit & co-occurrence
novel_features.description: Lists every role and right a user holds across the whole domain tree and builds a role co-occurrence matrix.

novel_features.name: Roster-vs-live reconciliation
novel_features.description: Read-only diff between a provided roster file and live enrollments: who is missing, extra, or has a role mismatch.
